reviews.review_title: I like split second but not this game
reviews.review_description:
You badly need a crouch button but there isn’t any. Worst reloading I seen in a VR game. Enemies  barely even notice you. 

I may get it again, if it ever improves .

Right now not worth a buy

I am giving this 3 stars only due to the frustration of every time I make it to a base or farm it freezes and kicks me back to the beginning. And then there's no more rifle and I can only get the pistol. I love transport on the CH46 and would love to see what I could find but it never let's me have more than about 4 minutes of play which I spend running to a camp or village then freeze and back to homebase.

Map is lifeless, barely any enemies. You will walk around for awhile til you run into any and when you do it like 3 or 4. Day night cycle and a bunch of bugs. I was expecting some action and played for an hr and did nothing but run around and only kill 3 enemies

reviews.review_title: What Tactical Assault VR should be
reviews.review_description: Don’t get me wrong TAVR is a great game but this is exactly what I wanted from a vr shooter. Some problems are the game doesn’t really tell you how to heal or how things initially work. And the map is pretty confusing. But other than that very great game and I’m so excited to see the next updates. (Please add some footsteps to the A.I ;) )

I was fortunate to be an early tester for this game. The dev was very responsive with suggestions and bugs that myself and others found. It is early access so expect to find some bugs and odd things, but overall worth the price. I was excited from day one once I learned about it. The things that are planned are amazing as well! Would highly recommend! The gameplay is super fun, especially if you enjoy the likes of GZW!

This is the next big extraction shooter, co op is planned, thank God no pvp it's already enough of them out, this game has day / night cycle, co op is planned, vehicles are planned this game is going to be way different then those other extraction shooters, the map is easy to understand some find it difficult, the game has bugs but not game breaking it's still in early access, the dev is going to make this separate it self from the other extraction shooters 

More weapons are planned, more mission types, and a lot more to come, so stay tuned, keep up the good work dev

This game met my expectations for it being early and being developed by only one developer. But it is very buggy like guns you put on the gun wall disappear when you walk away, A door to the side, inside the armory that i think is sopposed to be in the door frame, or even the helicopter taking off when you aren’t inside it at your base. I hope you also add a shop to buy weapons and ammo from. IRecommend you add armor to buy and there’s different levels to it. The base also feels long so adding NOCs walking around would also be nice same with the helicopter. Also add a system you can make waypoints to make it easier to travel around. Tis game has so much potential

Since I’m a tabor player and also enjoy extraction based games, I decided to try this game out and didn’t regret it as it is amazing. It has bugs here and there but for lord sakes its in EA. This game has a lot of potential to be the next big extraction game next to ghosts of tabor

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! I can only hope it will be up there with GOT one day. In time for sure!

reviews.review_title: Needs a good coop and pvp
reviews.review_description: Guns work very well , graphic s , a solid 3  ,  game play as a early access goes  very well  , needs some work but other then that well done . Get the other stuff in the game and you have a winner here😁😁😁😁,cheers
Bad graphics and when I wanted to refund it it said that I was ineligible even though I played it under an hour and bought it less than a day prior

I truly enjoy this game the vibe the combat one thing I want though is to get rid of the hud on night vision kinda gives me more motion sickness. I don’t know if it’s already a feature but I’m just asking.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to review! Sure thing, I will look into removing it in the next update.

reviews.review_description: My guns disappear when I leave the game and sometimes my pistol mag went into my rifle. Very fun but be patient with updates to get rid of bugs, and please add a feature to zoom in and out of the map on the phone

developer_response.body: Hey thank you for taking the time to review! I definitely plan to flesh out as many of the bugs as possible over the next month or so before continuing to add content to the game. Glad you found it fun still despite the bugs and can't wait to see where Shadowline goes in the future!

reviews.review_description: I was one of the first people to try this game in very early access. Game has so much potential buying it such a good investment

In the game I got trapped in a cage for some reason it was bad like I know that this is early access but come on releasing it in a state like this is criminal like sometimes the mag glitches out and can’t go back in or the mag turns into a different mag. There is no indicator that you are bleeding except the phone. I’m just generally disappointed with the game.

developer_response.body:
Update:

Hey I just wanted to notify you I just put out a new update that fixes most of the bugs I have been notified about in my discord see the following

- Mags no longer glitch where they cannot be placed into weapons

- The ability to place several mags into weapons is no longer able to happen.

- Quest 3/3S users should notice a significant increase in visual quality. The pixel density was increased along with MSAA (AntiAliasing). Quest 2 users should notice a very slight increase in quality but do not expect much due to hardware constraints I could not increase the factors as much as I could on Quest 3/3S.

- The primary slot should be much easier to place weapons in/out

Old Response:

Hey sorry you were dissatisfied with your purchase, my hope is to iron out the mag bugs next week. Your character will start making noises when they are hurting which should be an indicator to check out the phone so you know what medical supplies to use. To be honest the bug where you are trapped in a cage please join the discord and give more details if you can I don't even think there is a cage in the game but would love to fix it provided more info. All in all it's early access just trying to gauge interest and give a fair price as development progresses. Hope you are able to enjoy it more in the future!

reviews.review_description:
Words cant describe how bad this game is.
Grafiks worse than quest one.  Tons of bugs, nothing works not even walking sounds
Just dont buy this mess.

developer_response.body:
Update:

I just pushed an update that should fix the bugs brought to my attention see the following

- Mags no longer glitch where they cannot be placed into weapons

- The ability to place several mags into weapons is no longer able to happen.

- Quest 3/3S users should notice a significant increase in visual quality. The pixel density was increased along with MSAA (AntiAliasing). Quest 2 users should notice a very slight increase in quality but do not expect much due to hardware constraints I could not increase the factors as much as I could on Quest 3/3S.

- The primary slot should be much easier to place weapons in/out


Initial Response: 

Hey I'm sorry you weren't happy with my game. I am going to do a bug fix update this week and increase the pixel density to hopefully give a better visual experience. Definitely will add walking sounds in the future. Keep in mind this is early access, hope others can't find things they do like about the game vs focusing on the expected early access flaws. Hope I can make you happy in the future take care
